Modern, collaborative CRM platform built: 现代化的、协作的 CRM 平台可以完全自定义和实时操作。
\nTo use Attio, you need to generate an:
To use Attio, you need to generate an Access Token:
1. Login to your Attio account at https://app.attio.com.
2. From the dropdown beside your workspace name, click Workspace settings.
3. Click the Developers tab.
4. Click on the "New Access Token" button.
5. Set the appropriate Scopes for the integration.
6. Copy the generated Access Token.

Triggers when a new record such as perso: 创建个人、公司或交易等新记录时触发事件。
Triggers when an existing record is upda: 当现有记录更新时触发(人员、公司、交易等)。
Triggers when an existing entry is updat: 当已有条目更新时触发.
Triggers when a call recording finishes: 当通话录制完成和媒体上传完成时触发。

Only trigger when the selected field equ: 只在选定字段等于此值时触发(大小写不敏感)。留空则触发到此字段的任何更新。
